---
description: "Required instructions for creating or editing any Markdown (.md) files"
applyTo: '**/*.md'
---

# Markdown Instructions

These instructions define the Markdown style guide for this workspace.

## General Conventions

* Use UTF-8 and plain ASCII punctuation unless content requires otherwise
* Keep lines reasonably short for readability
* End files with a single newline

## Headings

* Start documents with a single level-1 heading (or use YAML frontmatter `title:` field)
* Increase heading levels by one at a time; do not skip levels
* Prefer ATX style (`#`, `##`, `###`) for headings
* Surround each heading with a blank line above and below
* Do not end headings with punctuation
* Use exactly one space after the `#` characters

## YAML Frontmatter

* All markdown files SHOULD include YAML frontmatter at the beginning
* Use triple-dash delimiters (`---`) on separate lines to wrap frontmatter
* When frontmatter includes a `title:` field, do NOT use an H1 heading

## Lists

* Use unordered list markers consistently; prefer `*`
* Indent sublist content by 2 spaces per level
* Surround lists with blank lines before and after
* Fragment bullet points: do NOT end with periods
* Complete sentence bullet points: end with periods

## Code Blocks

* Use fenced code blocks with triple backticks
* Always specify a language for fenced code blocks; use `text` if no highlighting applies
* Surround code blocks with blank lines
* Do not add spaces inside backticks of code spans

## Links and Images

* Write `[text](url)`, not reversed
* Avoid bare URLs; wrap in angle brackets or make proper links
* Provide alt text for all images

## Tables

* Surround tables with blank lines
* Use leading and trailing pipes on all rows
* Ensure every row has the same number of cells as the header

## Spacing

* No trailing spaces at end of lines
* No multiple consecutive blank lines
* Files end with exactly one trailing newline

Generated by autoharness | Template: markdown.instructions.md.tmpl
